subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen counseleth the friends of God unto that which is the cause and source of the exaltation of man's station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی دوستان الهی را وصیت میفرماید بانچه که سبب و علت رفعت مقام انسانست
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @call to action, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
